project: Hal Cloud Daytona Sandbox Orchestration v1
description: Terminal-first cloud orchestration for running hal workloads in Daytona sandboxes with durable run state, adapter parity, auth profile lifecycle management, lease-based concurrency control, idempotent GitHub side effects, and strict secret redaction.

userStories.title: Create runs table schema
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want durable run records so orchestration can recover after restarts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a runs table with columns id, repo, base_branch, engine, auth_profile_id, scope_ref, status, attempt_count, max_attempts, deadline_at, created_at, and updated_at.
Restrict runs.status to exactly queued, claimed, running, retrying, succeeded, failed, or canceled.
Create a queue index on (status, created_at).
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create attempts table schema
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want attempt-level state so heartbeat and retry behavior is explicit.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an attempts table with columns id, run_id, attempt_number, worker_id, sandbox_id, status, started_at, heartbeat_at, lease_expires_at, ended_at, error_code, and error_message.
Enforce at most one active attempt row per run_id.
Create indexes on (run_id), (status), and (lease_expires_at).
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create events table schema
userStories.description: As an operator, I want durable run timelines so status and logs commands can read authoritative history.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an events table with columns id, run_id, attempt_id, event_type, payload_json, redacted, and created_at.
Ensure normal application write paths append new events and do not update or delete existing events.
Create an index on (run_id, created_at).
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create idempotency keys table schema
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want persisted idempotency keys so retries cannot duplicate external side effects.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an idempotency_keys table with columns key, run_id, side_effect_type, result_ref, and created_at.
Enforce a unique constraint on idempotency_keys.key.
Return a deterministic duplicate_key domain error on duplicate key insert attempts.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create auth profiles table schema
userStories.description: As an operator, I want reusable auth profiles so credentials are linked once and reused by workers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an auth_profiles table with columns id, owner_id, provider, mode, secret_ref, status, max_concurrent_runs, runtime_metadata_json, last_validated_at, expires_at, last_error_code, version, created_at, and updated_at.
Restrict auth_profiles.status to exactly pending_link, linked, invalid, or revoked.
Enforce max_concurrent_runs >= 1.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create auth profile locks table schema
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want lease-based locks so shared subscription sessions are concurrency-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an auth_profile_locks table with columns auth_profile_id, run_id, worker_id, acquired_at, heartbeat_at, lease_expires_at, and released_at.
Create an index on (auth_profile_id, lease_expires_at).
Enforce no duplicate active lock row for the same (auth_profile_id, run_id).
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define Store interface and domain error types
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I want a single persistence contract so orchestration logic is adapter-agnostic.
acceptanceCriteria: Define Store methods for enqueue, claim, transition, attempt heartbeat, event append/read, idempotency put/get, auth profile read/update, and auth lock acquire/renew/release.
Define shared domain errors: not_found, conflict, duplicate_key, lease_expired, and invalid_transition.
Compile the service layer without adapter-specific imports.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add adapter contract test suite skeleton
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want adapter-neutral tests so correctness rules are defined once.
acceptanceCriteria: Add contract tests for enqueue, atomic claim, one-active-attempt invariant, heartbeat renewal, and transition guards.
Add a parallel claim test that asserts exactly one winner per run.
Support adapter factory injection through newStoreForTest.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Postgres run, attempt, and event operations
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I want Postgres support for core orchestration paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement Postgres methods for run enqueue, claim, transition, and attempt/event writes.
Use atomic claim SQL that is safe under concurrent workers.
Pass contract tests for Postgres run, attempt, and event scenarios.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Postgres auth and idempotency operations
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I want Postgres support for auth lock and side-effect safety paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement Postgres methods for idempotency put/get and auth lock acquire/renew/release.
Implement Postgres auth profile metadata and status update methods.
Pass contract tests for Postgres auth and idempotency scenarios.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Turso run, attempt, and event operations
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I want Turso support for core orchestration paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement Turso methods for run enqueue, claim, transition, and attempt/event writes.
Match contract claim semantics under contention.
Pass contract tests for Turso run, attempt, and event scenarios.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Turso auth and idempotency operations
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I want Turso support for auth lock and side-effect safety paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement Turso methods for idempotency put/get and auth lock acquire/renew/release.
Implement Turso auth profile metadata and status update methods.
Pass contract tests for Turso auth and idempotency scenarios.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build adapter parity benchmark harness
userStories.description: As a platform owner, I want comparable adapter metrics so default DB choice is evidence-based.
acceptanceCriteria: Run benchmark scenarios claim_contention, heartbeat_renewal, retry_requeue, cancel_path, and auth_lock_contention for both adapters.
Emit JSON results with fixed keys: scenario, adapter, runs, errors, claim_p95_ms, heartbeat_p95_ms, duplicate_claims, and lock_overcommit_violations.
Generate a report artifact for each adapter run.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement submit validation and enqueue path
userStories.description: As an operator, I want invalid runs rejected before queueing.
acceptanceCriteria: Validate required fields repo, base_branch, engine, auth_profile_id, and scope_ref.
Reject profiles not in linked status and reject engine/provider mismatches.
Enforce provider policy allow/deny before creating a queued run.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement atomic claim and auth lock acquisition transaction
userStories.description: As a worker, I want ownership acquisition to be all-or-nothing.
acceptanceCriteria: Use one transaction to transition one eligible run to claimed and create an attempt row.
Acquire the auth lock lease in the same transaction.
Rollback run claim and attempt creation if lock acquisition fails.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement attempt and auth lock heartbeat renewals
userStories.description: As a worker, I want lease renewals so healthy attempts are not reclaimed.
acceptanceCriteria: Update attempts.heartbeat_at and extend attempts.lease_expires_at on heartbeat.
Update auth_profile_locks.heartbeat_at and extend auth_profile_locks.lease_expires_at on heartbeat.
Emit a lease_lost terminal event and stop worker execution when lease renewal fails.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement stale-attempt reconciler
userStories.description: As an operator, I want stale attempts detected and closed automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Scan active attempts where lease_expires_at is earlier than now.
Mark stale attempts terminal with error_code set to stale_attempt.
Release auth lock leases associated with stale attempts.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement retry scheduler with exponential backoff
userStories.description: As an operator, I want deterministic retry transitions for retryable failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Support configurable max_attempts and exponential backoff in retry policy.
Transition retry-eligible runs through failed to retrying to queued.
Keep runs that exceed max_attempts in terminal failed state.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Daytona sandbox provisioning
userStories.description: As a worker, I want deterministic sandbox creation so each attempt has isolated runtime.
acceptanceCriteria: Provision a Daytona sandbox from configured template or image.
Persist sandbox_id on the attempt row.
Emit sandbox_created and sandbox_ready events.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement sandbox teardown on all terminal paths
userStories.description: As a worker, I want teardown to always run on terminal paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Emit teardown_started before calling sandbox teardown.
Run teardown on success, failure, cancel, and timeout paths.
Emit teardown_done after teardown completes.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement worker bootstrap setup steps
userStories.description: As a worker, I want deterministic environment setup before Hal execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Run required binary checks before repository clone.
Clone or fetch the repository and checkout the target branch.
Run hal init only when the .hal directory is missing.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Hal execution runner modes
userStories.description: As a worker, I want a controlled execution step so run mode is explicit.
acceptanceCriteria: Support execution modes until_complete and bounded_batch.
Persist execution start and finish events including the selected mode.
Capture command exit status for failure classification input.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement failure classifier and retry mapping
userStories.description: As an operator, I want consistent failure codes for retry decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Define classifier codes bootstrap_failed, auth_invalid, policy_blocked, stale_attempt, run_timeout, and non_retryable.
Map provider, preflight, bootstrap, and runtime failures to classifier codes.
Determine retry eligibility using classifier code mapping only.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement hard-timeout reconciliation
userStories.description: As an operator, I want overdue runs terminated automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Set deadline_at during submit using default or policy values.
Mark runs beyond deadline as failed with error_code run_timeout.
Emit a run_timeout event on timeout transition.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement secure auth materialization and cleanup
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want worker credential materialization to be secure by default.
acceptanceCriteria: Materialize auth artifacts from secret_ref only during runtime.
Create auth directories with mode 0700 and files with mode 0600.
Remove materialized auth files in teardown.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement provider preflight and compatibility validation
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want headless validation before Hal execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Run provider-specific non-interactive preflight command before execution.
Validate runtime metadata compatibility for OS, architecture, and CLI major/minor version.
Fail with auth_profile_incompatible when metadata validation fails.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement credential writeback with optimistic versioning
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want refreshed credentials persisted safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Detect changed auth artifacts and write back encrypted secret data through the Auth Broker.
Require optimistic version checks using auth_profiles.version on writeback.
On success, update last_validated_at and expires_at and clear last_error_code.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement deterministic secret redaction rule engine
userStories.description: As an operator, I want deterministic masking so secret handling is testable.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement rules for bearer tokens, GitHub PATs, device codes, session cookies, and API keys.
Add fixture-based unit tests per rule with expected masked output assertions.
Use exactly [REDACTED] as the mask token.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Apply redaction to persisted and streamed logs
userStories.description: As an operator, I want every log path redacted before visibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Apply redaction before writing bootstrap, preflight, runtime, and error events.
Apply the same redaction engine before streaming logs to CLI output.
Verify via integration tests that no raw fixture secret appears in DB rows or CLI streams.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement idempotent PR creation side effect
userStories.description: As an operator, I want retries to reuse PR creation results.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate a deterministic idempotency key for PR create actions.
Return stored PR reference without external create call when key already exists.
Verify in retry tests that exactly one external PR create call occurs.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement idempotent PR update and comment side effects
userStories.description: As an operator, I want retries to avoid duplicate PR follow-up actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate deterministic idempotency keys for PR update and comment actions.
Return stored result without duplicate external call when key already exists.
Verify in retry tests that no duplicate comment or update side effect occurs.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hal-cloud submit command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a clear submit command response for automation and human use.
acceptanceCriteria: Support flags --repo, --base, --engine, --auth-profile, and --scope.
Default output includes run_id, status, engine, auth_profile, and submitted_at.
Return machine-readable error codes in --json output for validation failures.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hal-cloud status command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want quick visibility into run progress and health.
acceptanceCriteria: Output run_id, status, attempt_count, max_attempts, current_attempt, last_heartbeat_age, and deadline_at.
Keep --json output keys stable and documented.
Return non-zero exit with not_found error code for unknown run IDs.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hal-cloud logs command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want historical and live run logs from terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: Return logs <run-id> events ordered by ascending timestamp.
Stream new events with logs <run-id> --follow until interrupted.
Guarantee output contains no unredacted fixture secret tokens.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hal-cloud cancel command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want safe cancellation semantics.
acceptanceCriteria: Set cancel intent and return current cancel state for cancel <run-id>.
Ensure active workers observe cancel intent within one heartbeat interval.
Exclude canceled runs from future claims and retries.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hal-cloud auth link command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want interactive profile linking outside worker sandboxes.
acceptanceCriteria: Start provider link flow from operator environment via auth link --provider --profile.
Store an encrypted secret reference on successful link.
Transition profile status to linked only after validation succeeds.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hal-cloud auth import command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to import local authenticated artifacts when interactive link is unavailable.
acceptanceCriteria: Read local auth artifacts from auth import --provider --profile --source.
Encrypt imported artifacts and store them as secret reference.
Record an audit event with profile ID and provider during import.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hal-cloud auth status command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want profile readiness visibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Show provider, profile state, lock owner, lock expiry, and compatibility summary for auth status <profile>.
Return non-zero exit with not_found error code when profile is missing.
Keep --json output keys stable and documented.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hal-cloud auth validate command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want explicit profile validation before submit.
acceptanceCriteria: Run provider validation checks with auth validate <profile>.
Update last_validated_at on success and last_error_code on failure.
Return non-zero exit with auth_invalid or auth_profile_incompatible on validation failure.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hal-cloud auth revoke command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want fast profile revocation for compromised credentials.
acceptanceCriteria: Transition profile status to revoked and emit an audit event on auth revoke <profile>.
Reject revoked profiles in submit validation.
Block lock lease renewals tied to revoked profiles.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
